description:
You are the on-call incident responder for a three-node micro-service cluster.  
    Logs for each node have already been collected for you under  
    /home/user/cluster_logs/ as:

        /home/user/cluster_logs/node1.log
        /home/user/cluster_logs/node2.log
        /home/user/cluster_logs/node3.log

    1. Determine how many lines in each file contain the exact word “ERROR”
       (case-sensitive, whole word match).
    2. Create the directory /home/user/incident_report/ (if it does not already exist).
    3. Write a single summary file called /home/user/incident_report/summary.log
       whose contents MUST match *exactly* the four-line format below:

       Node: node1 Errors: <INTEGER>
       Node: node2 Errors: <INTEGER>
       Node: node3 Errors: <INTEGER>
       Worst Node: <NODE_NAME_WITH_MOST_ERRORS>

       • Replace the <INTEGER> placeholders with the correct counts you measured.  
       • Replace <NODE_NAME_WITH_MOST_ERRORS> with the node that has the
         highest error count (if there is a tie, list any one of the tied nodes).

    Verification notes that will be checked automatically:
       • The file /home/user/incident_report/summary.log must exist.  
       • It must contain **exactly four lines** (newline-terminated).  
       • Each line must follow the precise spacing and capitalization shown.  
       • The error counts must be correct, and the “Worst Node” line must name
         the node with the highest error count.

    Produce no extra files in /home/user/incident_report/.
    You do not need root privileges; everything is under /home/user.
truth:
Initial files present before the agent begins:

    1. /home/user/cluster_logs/node1.log
       Contents (4 lines):
           INFO service started
           ERROR failed to connect db
           WARN retrying
           ERROR timeout

    2. /home/user/cluster_logs/node2.log
       Contents (6 lines):
           INFO service started
           INFO healthcheck pass
           INFO user login
           ERROR disk full
           ERROR disk full
           ERROR disk full

    3. /home/user/cluster_logs/node3.log
       Contents (3 lines):
           INFO service started
           WARN memory usage high
           INFO request processed

    Expected artefacts after correct agent execution:

    • Directory: /home/user/incident_report/  (mode 755 or 700 acceptable)

    • File: /home/user/incident_report/summary.log
      Exact contents (each line ends with a single LF character):

          Node: node1 Errors: 2
          Node: node2 Errors: 3
          Node: node3 Errors: 0
          Worst Node: node2

      (four lines, no trailing blank line).

    No other new files or directories should be created anywhere inside /home/user.
